patterns.icon-only-detection: When an icon prop is provided but no text content is passed to the default slot and loading is false, the button automatically switches to icon-only mode using btn--icon-{size} classes instead of btn--{size} classes. This ensures proper square dimensions and centering for icon-only buttons.
patterns.loading-state-behavior: When loading is true, the button displays a spinner and optional loadingText, completely replacing any icon and default slot content. The button is automatically disabled (disabled || loading) to prevent multiple submissions. Set loadingText prop to show text alongside the spinner during loading.
patterns.icon-size-mapping: Button sizes (xs, sm, md, lg) map to icon sizes using iconSizeMap: xs→xs(12px), sm→sm(16px), md→sm(16px), lg→md(20px). The Icon component automatically receives the appropriate size prop based on the button size, ensuring visual consistency without manual size specification.
patterns.href-button-element: When href prop is provided, the component renders an <a> tag instead of <button> tag, maintaining identical visual styling and behavior. This allows buttons to function as navigation links while preserving semantics. The type prop is ignored when href is set, as <a> tags don't have a type attribute.
